use_cases: Displaying bot protection features on security-focused landing pages
Showcasing AI-driven fraud prevention capabilities in SaaS product pages
Adding animated security visualizations to feature comparison sections
ai_summary: A dark-themed feature card component showcasing bot detection capabilities with an animated radial gradient visualization. The component displays a title, description, and a sci-fi-style animated element that cycles through positions to represent threat detection scanning. Designed for security-focused landing pages and SaaS platforms to highlight fraud prevention features.
